channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - wccftech.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for wccftech.com

item.title: “A Serenity Soon to be Disturbed”: Tales Publisher Bandai Namco Will Reveal a New RPG This Week
item.content:encoded:
Bandai Namco has dropped a curious teaser on X (formerly Twitter) announcing that it'll be revealing "a new RPG" later this week on March 5, at 3pm PT / 6pm ET / 11pm BT. The post is also accompanied with a short video that includes an T for Teen ESRB rating, a shot of a forest with a tower in the distance that reaches into the sky, followed by a character walking with a sword and shield on their back.

At that point, the teaser cuts, showing gold text that reads "New RPG reveal" with the March 5th date and timestamp for the announcement. There is practically no indication as to what this will be, but eagle-eyed players already have their guesses, with the top suggestion being that the studio will reveal a new game in the Tales franchise.

What we see of the character in the teaser and the animation style certainly support it being a new Tales game, along with the fact that the series is still in the midst of celebrating its 30th anniversary, which it officially hit in December 2025.

The series' most recent release also arrived just last week, a remaster of Tales of Berseria. Bandai is on a mission to remaster the Tales games, but with Thursday's announcement poised as something "new," then this could likely be the first brand-new entry in the series since 2021's Tales of Arise.

Speaking of those remasters, Wccftech's Francesco De Meo had a few things to say about the recent Berseria remaster following its reveal in November 2025. Hopefully the announcement coming later this week gives him more to be excited about in terms of the Tales series.

Or, this could just be something entirely new, and Bandai Namco is wondering why everyone is expecting a new Tales announcement that's not coming. We'll see what Thursday holds.

Follow Wccftech on Google to get more of our news coverage in your feeds.



https://wccftech.com/bandai-namco-reveal-new-rpg-this-week-new-tales-game/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Amazon Casts Chloe and Max for Upcoming Life is Strange TV Series
item.content:encoded:
On top of the two Fallout TV series adaptations, the upcoming God of War TV series, the Mass Effect series, and the Wolfenstein series that Amazon has in the works, in September 2025, it confirmed that it is working on a Life is Strange TV series adaptation.

The show is set to be written and led by Kaos writer, Charlie Covell, and today, in a new report from Variety, we learned who Amazon has tapped for the show's two lead roles, Max and Chloe. In the case of both casting choices, Amazon and Covell have opted to go for two young actors early in their career rather than two well-known names.

Tatum Grace Hopkins, who will be making her television debut in this Life is Strange series, is set to play Max, while Maisy Stella, who you might recognize from her roles in the TV show Nashville or 2024's film, My Old Ass, where she starred alongside Aubrey Plaza, will play Chloe.

It's unclear as to when the show will start filming, but with Hopkins and Stella already set in their lead roles, it appears that this Life is Strange adaptation is moving faster than the other aforementioned video game to TV show adaptations Amazon has in the works, save for the God of War show which entered production as of last week.

When the show was first announced, Covell said, "It's a huge honor to be adapting 'Life is Strange' for Amazon MGM Studios. I am a massive fan of the game, and I'm thrilled to be working with the incredible teams at Square Enix, Story Kitchen, and LuckyChap. I can't wait to share Max and Chloe's story with fellow players and new audiences alike."

As far as what's coming in the next Life is Strange game, Life is Strange: Reunion, which is billed as the conclusion to Max and Chloe's story, is set to arrive later this month on March 26, 2026.

Follow Wccftech on Google to get more of our news coverage in your feeds.



https://wccftech.com/life-is-strange-tv-series-max-chloe-cast-maisy-stella-tatum-grace-hopkins/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
